Container.Name: SeaDexArr-Audit
Container.Overview: SeaDexArr audit mode - scans your Sonarr library against SeaDex, applies Sonarr tags (seadex / partial-seadex / seadex-upgrade-available / seadex-too-large), and sends Discord notifications when recommendations change. Never downloads, grabs, or replaces files. Before starting: mount /config, run once with AUDIT_ARGS=--dry-run to generate config.yml, edit it with your Sonarr URL/API key/Discord webhook, then switch AUDIT_ARGS to --apply-tags.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Persistent config directory. Holds config.yml, cache.json, and audit_state.db.

Config.Name: Run Mode
Config.Description: audit = run audit on a repeating schedule (recommended). audit-once = run once and exit. sync = original grab/sync mode.

Config.Name: Audit Schedule (hours)
Config.Description: Hours between audit runs. Only used when RUN_MODE=audit.

Config.Name: Audit Flags
Config.Description: Flags passed to seadexarr audit. --apply-tags writes Sonarr tags (no downloads). --dry-run previews without any mutations. --notify-only sends Discord without changing tags.

Config.Name: Sync Schedule (hours)
Config.Description: Hours between runs when RUN_MODE=sync (original grab mode). Ignored in audit mode.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, CRITICAL.
